title: Docstring hygiene in benchmark fixture helpers
description: Add Sphinx-style docstrings for helper functions in tools/benchmark_discovery_fixtures.py without behavior changes.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added Sphinx-style docstrings for helper functions in tools/benchmark_discovery_fixtures.py (_issue_identifier, _issue_title, _build_issue, _write_issue, _generate_project_issues).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Helper functions in tools/benchmark_discovery_fixtures.py include Sphinx-style docstrings; behavior unchanged.
